title: Agostino
writer: Alberto Moravia, Goffredo Parise, Mauro Bolognini
actors: Ingrid Thulin, Paolo Colombo, Mario Bartoletti
plot: Agostino is a 13-year-old boy on vacation in Venice with his widowed mother. When a local stud seduces her, jealous Agostino joins a local group of juvenile delinquents out of protest. They force him to face his budding sexuality.
